author: mark
text: bl-4e7d filed for plugin-controlled commit policy on negotiation outcome. SPEC needs a CommitPolicy section: variants (Commit/Batch/Suppress), safety bounds (Suppress disallowed for required participants, batch coalesces only within one event dispatch), and the audit-attribution rule (plugin-supplied message wrapped with 'plugin: {name}: ' prefix). Either fold into SPEC scope when claimed, or treat bl-4e7d as the source of truth and have the SPEC reference it.
